name: Josh Durey
description: K-12 educator and AI evaluation specialist. Reproducible harnesses that measure whether AI education products actually work — built by someone who knows what wrong looks like in a real classroom.
heroHeadline: I measure whether AI education products work. The classroom background is what makes it real.
thesis: Most eval engineers have never run a classroom. Most educators can't build a fail-closed multi-model harness. The failures that sink AI education products are invisible to a generic eval — and obvious to someone who's taught. That's the intersection I work from.
